catalogRulesList.ruleDescription: Entire Dataset record count deviates from history < Threshold

catalogRulesList.ruleExpression:
SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(valid), 0) AS passed,
    COALESCE(SUM(invalid), 0) AS failed 
FROM (
    
    SELECT
        CASE 
            WHEN run_device_session_load_ceiling = 'VALID' THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS valid,
       
        CASE 
            WHEN run_device_session_load_ceiling = 'INVALID' THEN 1
            ELSE 0 
        END AS invalid
    FROM (
        
        SELECT 
            bad_count AS final_bad_count,
            CASE 
                WHEN bad_count = 0 THEN 'VALID' 
                ELSE 'INVALID' 
            END AS run_device_session_load_ceiling
        FROM (
            
            WITH violation_count AS (
                SELECT
                    COUNT(1) AS bad_count
                FROM
                    vz-it-np-jffv-dev-inopdo-0.vzw_inopdo_mns_curated_tbls.device_session_load
                WHERE ceiling>=TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), interval 1 DAY)) and ceiling > current_timestamp()
            )
            
            SELECT bad_count FROM violation_count
        )
    )
) AS temp_valid_invalid_scenario

catalogRulesList.bigqueryRuleexpression: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN first_name = CAST(date_of_joining AS STRING) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalid, SUM(CASE WHEN first_name = CAST(date_of_joining AS STRING) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS valid FROM (SELECT first_name, date_of_joining FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.BV_TEST_DATA) valid_invalid_scenario
catalogRulesList.ruleExpression: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN first_name = CAST(date_of_joining AS STRING) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalid, SUM(CASE WHEN first_name = CAST(date_of_joining AS STRING) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS valid FROM (SELECT first_name, date_of_joining FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.BV_TEST_DATA) valid_invalid_scenario

catalogRulesList.bigqueryRuleexpression: SELECT SUM(valid) AS passed, SUM(invalid) AS failed FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN Last_name IS NULL OR TRIM(Last_name) = '' OR LOWER(Last_name) = 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS invalid, CASE WHEN Last_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(Last_name) <> '' AND LOWER(Last_name) <> 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS valid FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.BV_TEST_DATA ) valid_invalid_scenario
catalogRulesList.ruleExpression: SELECT SUM(valid) AS passed, SUM(invalid) AS failed FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN Last_name IS NULL OR TRIM(Last_name) = '' OR LOWER(Last_name) = 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS invalid, CASE WHEN Last_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(Last_name) <> '' AND LOWER(Last_name) <> 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS valid FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.BV_TEST_DATA ) valid_invalid_scenario
